# Chore PR Template

## Description

<!-- Maintenance, dependency updates, config changes, tooling tweaks. -->

## Related Issues/Milestones

- Relates to #<issue_number> (optional)
- Milestone: <milestone_name_or_link> (optional)

## Changes

<!-- Bullet points of non-functional changes. -->

## Testing

- [ ] CI passes
- [ ] Smoke check(s):
  - [ ] App builds
  - [ ] Basic flows unaffected

## Risk

- Risk level: Low / Medium / High
- Notes: <anything notable about blast radius>

## Checklist

- [ ] Lint/format pass
- [ ] No user-facing behavior changes (unless stated)
- [ ] Docs updated if needed
